samples.text: A person drinks sand because they are thirsty. Is this expected based on common sense?
Someone consumes sand because of thirst. Does this match everyday common sense?
An individual drinks dry sand because they feel thirsty. Is this expected based on common sense?
Thirst is relieved by liquids, not sand. A thirsty person drinking sand does not relieve thirst. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
A person drinks sand because they are thirsty. The weather today is cloudy. Is this expected based on common sense?
